pg123-p1-s1: There will be alluring shortcuts and by-paths down which they may wander and lose their way.
pg123-p1: There will be alluring shortcuts and by-paths down which they may wander and lose their way.
pg123-p2-s1:
Suppose we tell you some of the obstacles a family will meet; suppose we suggest how they may be avoided - even
converted to good use for others.
pg123-p2-s2: The family of an alcoholic longs for the return of happiness and security.
pg123-p2-s3:
They
remember when father was romantic, thoughtful and successful.
pg123-p2-s4:
Today's life is measured against that of other years and,
when it falls short, the family may be unhappy.
pg123-p2:
Suppose we tell you some of the obstacles a family will meet; suppose we suggest how they may be avoided - even
converted to good use for others. The family of an alcoholic longs for the return of happiness and security. They
remember when father was romantic, thoughtful and successful. Today's life is measured against that of other years and,
when it falls short, the family may be unhappy.
pg123-p3-s1: Family confidence in dad is rising high.
pg123-p3-s2: The good old days will soon be back, they think.
pg123-p3-s3:
Sometimes they demand that dad
bring them back instantly!
pg123-p3-s4: God, they believe, almost owes this recompense on a long overdue account.
pg123-p3-s5:
But the head of the
house has spent years in pulling down the structures of business, romance, friendship, health - these things are now
ruined or damaged.
pg123-p3-s6: It will take time to clear away the wreck.
pg123-p3-s7:
Though old buildings will eventually be replaced by finer
ones, the new structures will take years to complete.
pg123-p3:
Family confidence in dad is rising high. The good old days will soon be back, they think. Sometimes they demand that dad
bring them back instantly! God, they believe, almost owes this recompense on a long overdue account. But the head of the
house has spent years in pulling down the structures of business, romance, friendship, health - these things are now
ruined or damaged. It will take time to clear away the wreck. Though old buildings will eventually be replaced by finer
ones, the new structures will take years to complete.
pg123-p4-s1:
Father knows he is to blame; it may take him many seasons of hard work to be restored financially, but he shouldn't be
reproached.
pg123-p4-s2: Perhaps he will never have much money again.
pg123-p4-s3:
But the wise family will admire him for what he is trying to
be, rather than for what he is trying to get.
pg123-p4:
Father knows he is to blame; it may take him many seasons of hard work to be restored financially, but he shouldn't be
reproached. Perhaps he will never have much money again. But the wise family will admire him for what he is trying to
be, rather than for what he is trying to get.
pg123-p5-s1:
Now and then the family will be plagued by spectres from the past, for the drinking career of almost every alcoholic has
been marked by escapades, funny, humiliating, shameful or tragic.
pg123-p5-s2:
The first impulse will be to bury these skeletons in a
dark closet and padlock the door.
pg123-p5-s3: The family may be possessed by the idea
pg123-p5:
Now and then the family will be plagued by spectres from the past, for the drinking career of almost every alcoholic has
been marked by escapades, funny, humiliating, shameful or tragic. The first impulse will be to bury these skeletons in a
dark closet and padlock the door. The family may be possessed by the idea
